extracted_information: Detailed billing information for GitHub Codespaces, including cost types, calculation methods, usage quotas for personal accounts, and a breakdown of compute and storage costs.

cost_types.name: Compute time
cost_types.description: Processing time and power, while the codespace is active. Billed hourly, reported monthly.
cost_types.calculation_method: Summing time used by all codespaces billable to an account. Proportional to processor cores.

cost_types.name: Storage
cost_types.description: Amount of disk space the codespace or prebuild occupies, while it exists. Measured in GB-hours.
includes: Files used in a codespace (cloned repositories, configuration files)
cost_types.notes: Default Linux image/dev containers with features are not included in storage volume calculation unless a custom base image is used.

billing_mechanism.payment_method: Payment method set up for your GitHub account.
usage_blocking_conditions: No valid payment method on file and quota used up.
options_when_blocked: Add a payment method and review budget settings.
Export changes from the codespace to a branch.
Wait for monthly included usage to reset.

billing_ownership.default: Billed to the account of the person who created the codespace or to the owning-organization.
billing_ownership.repository_transfer: Ownership and billing responsibility change with repository transfer according to new organization's settings.
billing_ownership.user_removal: Codespaces automatically deleted if user removed from organization/repository.
billing_ownership.forked_repository: Billed to personal account unless upstream (parent) repository is in an organization that allows billing at organization's expense. Prebuild storage costs for forked repos are personal, even if codespace is org-billed.
billing_ownership.template_repository: Billed to organization if allowed, otherwise to the user. If user publishes a codespace from a template, billing transfers to user's personal account.

managed_user_accounts.creation_restriction: Can only create codespace from template if billed to an organization.
managed_user_accounts.publishing_restriction: Cannot publish a codespace created from a template to a new repository.
